title: Install: linkedin-outreach-automation
description: Automates LinkedIn connection requests and follow-up messages to Sonesse/Nth Layer prospects. Direct fit for your 10 hot leads goal.

title: Install: seo-competitor-analysis
description: SEO intelligence and competitor analysis — useful for Sonesse.ai positioning against Recall.ai and other meeting bot competitors.

title: Install: cold-email
description: MachFive cold email sequences — builds and manages outbound email campaigns. Complement to Apollo for Nth Layer deal prospecting.

title: Install: abm-outbound
description: Account-based marketing outbound — targets specific companies (PE firms, SaaS CEOs) with personalised campaigns. Fits Nth Layer ICP perfectly.

title: Install: seo-article-gen
description: Generates SEO-optimised blog articles automatically — could replace the manual Sonesse tutorial writing and scale content output.

title: LinkedIn Outreach Agent
description: Daily personalised connection requests and messages to Sonesse/Nth Layer prospects. Targets CTOs, Heads of Product, and AI/Automation buyers at mid-market companies.

title: Proposal Follow-up Agent
description: Monitors open proposals and sends follow-up reminders 3, 7, and 14 days after sending. Drafts personalised check-in messages for your review.

title: Sonesse Content Engine
description: Generates 3x LinkedIn posts per week based on Sonesse tutorials, customer pain points, and competitor moves. Queues for your approval before posting.

title: Nth Layer Pipeline Tracker
description: Connects to Pipedrive, monitors deal stage changes, flags stalled deals, and prepares weekly pipeline summary with recommended next actions.

title: Meeting Notes → Tasks Agent
description: Connects Granola meeting notes to OpenClaw. Extracts action items automatically and creates tasks in the dashboard within 5 minutes of a meeting ending.

title: Welsh CPO Market Map Agent
description: Weekly scan of Welsh tech companies without a CPO or with a product gap. Builds a ranked outreach list — feeds directly into the Nth Layer pipeline.
